review_summary.test_parity: The sharded review accepted the 24 before / 24 after parity evidence with no missing, added, or duplicate tests after combining root, shard, and parity artifact evidence.
review_summary.fixture_equivalence: The helper shard confirmed four exported factory functions create independent objects, use no module-level mutable shared state, and use correct relative imports.
review_summary.guard_assertion_preservation: The execution-guards shard confirmed fixed-development gate, local completion authority rejection, workspace mutation guard, and isolated worker worktree tests retain fail-closed assertions and completion-blocking evidence.
review_summary.manifest_and_plan: The manifest/plan shards confirmed the 801-line root remains planned_refactor with a 650-line follow-up target, while the 244-line shard and 212-line helper are accepted and below the near-threshold budget.
